content: اِلمَكسَب اِللي اِلمَكاَن بِيَعْمَلُه مِش كِفاَيَة لِلإيجَار
translations: eng:the profit the place makes isn't enough to pay the rent

transcriptions.arabizi: ilmaksab il-liilmakaen biyiaAmil|uh mish kifaeya li|il'ieegaar
